author: stefanbratanov
content: <@592004585506340885> regarding this test https://github.com/StefanBratanov/consensus-spec-tests/tree/master/tests/mainnet/capella/networking/gossip_bls_to_execution_change/pyspec_tests/gossip_bls_to_execution_change__ignore_pre_capella there is custom config.yaml which sets CAPELLA_FORK_EPOCH to 1 but BELLATRIX_FORK_EPOCH and others are untouched, which breaks some of Teku internal logic to protect against this, does it make more sense to edit these tests to set other fork epoch to 0?

author: tersec
content: oh yeah https://media.githubusercontent.com/media/StefanBratanov/consensus-spec-tests/refs/heads/master/tests/mainnet/capella/networking/gossip_bls_to_execution_change/pyspec_tests/gossip_bls_to_execution_change__ignore_pre_capella/config.yaml is patent nonsense and Nimbus will reject it

author: tersec
content: https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth2/blob/6fb05f36804d53c2e8e014cfeeea8ad7996a5efe/beacon_chain/spec/datatypes/base.nim#L974-L1002 we have logic specifically for this

author: jtraglia
content: Hmm this test has been very annoying to deal with 😅 yes it does make sense to set those to zero. I’ll make a PR which does that later today, then provide some updated reference tests for you.
